ops.title: Layer 4 (live cache-economics rewriter) is DONE on main — the L0/L1/L2 engine, fail-open invariant, and the known follow-up.
ops.body:
cc-squash **Layer 4 — the live cache-economics rewriter — is COMPLETE on `main`** (built 2026-06-25 via 5 dynamic workflows; 260 Rust tests + Go suite green, clippy `-D warnings` clean, `/codex`-reviewed). Canonical as-built brief: cc-notes doc **bcd384b**; live-A/B runbook: cc-notes **31802a0**.

Shape: L0 (sync SSE `usage` tap → `CacheState` + `failsafe` breaker), L1 (off-path `stage_next` summarizer staging keyed by content-address; gated on having squash candidates so trivial turns make no LLM call), L2 (sandboxed `intercept.rs` Interceptor: recompute geometry on live bytes → `Controller::decide` → pure `ccs-policy` splice + validity gate, fail-open). Retrieve via rmcp 1.8 on a panic-isolated 2nd listener. Cardinal invariant: any error/timeout/panic/gate-failure forwards the original byte-for-byte.

**Known follow-up (not a blocker):** the live loop currently squashes only single-message string-content segments; tool-pair/array-content (the bulk — tool output) fails-open/skipped. Target `tool_result` text blocks via the splice's existing `SegmentTarget::Block` to reclaim the bulk. Also unbuilt: the `ccs-eval` statistical substrate. Live A/B (Exp D, AB-oracle, retrieve-through-real-CC) is the user's to run.

Next: **Layer 5** (transcript durability mirror) — see [[cc-squash-layer1-build]] lineage and the §7 Layer-4 "FOR THE PHASE-5 AGENT" pointers in `.claude/research/cc-squash-build-plan.md`.
